opensearchservice.domain.offpeakwindow.C: A custom 10-hour, low-traffic window during which OpenSearch Service can perform mandatory configuration changes on the domain. These actions can include scheduled service software updates and blue/green Auto-Tune enhancements. OpenSearch Service will schedule these actions during the window that you specify. If you don't specify a window start time, it defaults to 10:00 P.M. local time.

opensearchservice.domain.offpeakwindow.W.Description: The desired start time for an off-peak maintenance window.
